name: The Three Queens
description: The Game of Thrones is over, and by some miracle, peace has been achieved. You, a noble from a relatively unimportant house, are accepted as a compromise-candidate for the Iron Throne. To keep the peace, and to keep the realm together, you have been granted three wives. They are Daenerys Targaryen, Sansa Stark, and Margaery Tyrell.
creator: KingBiff
